title: linanthus harknessii var. septentrionalis
intro: Linanthus harknessii var. septentrionalis, also known as the Northern Blue-eyed Mary, is a rare and unique variety of the Linanthus harknessii plant, a species of flowering plant in the Polemoniaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is said to possess medicinal properties that can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Linanthus harknessii var. septentrionalis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe irritated skin and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to support digestive health and calm the nervous system.
